name: Van Pool Transportation
carrier_operation: Interstate, for-hire passenger service; Authorized for Passenger transport
fmcsa_address: NRT Bus Inc: 55 Hampshire Rd, Methuen, MA 01844 (mailing: 230 Main St, North Reading, MA 01864). Van Pool brand operates from 2/6 Fox Rd, Hudson MA 01749 as a local base.

officers: owned by Beacon Mobility (parent: Audax-backed AG Van Pool Holdings LP); BlackArch Partners advised on Fort Point sale
registry_source: Federal Register STB filings (2024-2026); Beacon Mobility / Van Pool LLC corporate materials (MA SOS Corporations Division not directly retrieved)
notes: Critical caveat: SAFER keyword search 'VAN POOL' returns NO records under that name. The Van Pool brand operates under sister entity NRT Bus Inc (USDOT 1166825) - reported power units (1,156) and drivers (1,440) reflect the combined NRT Bus/Van Pool fleet, not just the Hudson base. Van Pool Transportation LLC has been the named acquirer in multiple STB filings (TransAction Corporate Shuttles 2024, Rolling V Bus Corp 2025, Specialty Transportation 2026), suggesting it is a holding/operating LLC distinct from NRT Bus. Original Van Pool brand founded 1986 in Western MA; joined Beacon Mobility 2021. Hudson MA location (2 Fox Rd / 6 Fox Rd variants) is one of several regional bases (also Wilbraham, Barre, Fitchburg, Wrentham, Duxbury). NOT a viable independent tuck-in - already owned by Beacon Mobility / Audax.
